## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- How do we know this is fixed? -->
- [ ] Given [reproduction steps], the bug no longer occurs
- [ ] Regression test added to prevent recurrence

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Root cause identified and documented in PR
- [ ] Failing test committed before fix (TDD)
- [ ] Fix does not break existing tests
- [ ] PR reviewed with C.L.E.A.R. framework
